name: easyflowutils

metadata.name: easyflowutils
metadata.summary: A utility package for Easy Flow automation

documentation:
# EasyFlow Utils

A simple utility package for EasyFlow, demonstrating packaging and distribution.

## Installation
```chatinput
pip install easyflowutils
```

Initialize the ManyChat client.

Args:
    api_key (str): Your ManyChat API key

documentation: Make a request to the ManyChat API.

methods.name: easyflowutils.manychat_client.ManyChatClient.get_subscriber_info
documentation: Get information about a specific subscriber.

methods.name: easyflowutils.manychat_client.ManyChatClient.find_subscriber_custom_field
documentation: Find a subscriber by a custom field.

methods.name: easyflowutils.manychat_client.ManyChatClient.find_subscriber_by_system_field
documentation: Get a subscriber by email or phone number.
A Python client for the ManyChat API.
